description: Shared definitions for Doom over AT Protocol.

keyState.description: Bitmask of currently pressed keys for one game tick.

keys.description: Bitmask of pressed keys. Bit 0=forward, 1=backward, 2=left, 3=right, 4=fire, 5=use, 6=strafe, 7=speed, 8-15=weapon select, 16=escape, 17=enter, 18=tab (map), 19=pause.

encoding.description: How the frame data is encoded.

encodingPng.description: Frame encoded as PNG image blob.

encodingPaletteRle.description: Frame encoded as RLE-compressed palette-indexed buffer.
